name: Tirami Su 1
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa powder (sifted or coarsely grated)
1 cup Rum or liqueur (Amaretto or similar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange ladyfingers on the bottom of an 8 by 13 rectangular dish.
2. Pour rum over the ladyfingers.
3. In a large bowl, combine egg yolks and powdered sugar. Beat well until the mixture turns pale yellow and forms ribbons when the beaters are raised.
4. Carefully stir in mascarpone cheese until completely incorporated.
5. In another clean bowl, whip egg whites to form stiff peaks.
6. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the mascarpone mixture.
7. Pour the batter over the ladyfingers and top with cocoa powder.
8. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving from the dish.
